message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for recorder_audit, recorder_retention (+59) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

recorder_audit.rs (+24): AccessTier level/satisfies same+higher+lower/Display all 5/Ord/Hash
in set/serde all 5 variants/default_for_actor all 4, AuthzDecision Debug/Clone/eq/serde all 3,
ActorIdentity Debug/Clone/eq/serde roundtrip, AuditEventType serde all 15 variants/Hash in set,
AuditScope default/serde roundtrip/skip_serializing_if empty, AuditLogConfig default values/serde,
ChainVerification Debug/Clone/eq, constants values, AuditLog drain idempotent/resume continues ordinal.

recorder_retention.rs (+35): RetentionConfig Debug/Clone/default values/serde roundtrip/
validate zero warm_days/cold_days/segment_bytes/duration/t1_extended limit, SensitivityTier
Debug/Clone/Copy/eq/Ord/Hash/serde all 3/requires_accelerated_purge, SegmentPhase Debug/Copy/
Ord/Hash all 4/serde all 4/is_writable/is_queryable/valid_transitions/can_transition_to invalid,
SegmentMeta make_id all tiers/Debug/Clone/serde, RetentionSweepResult default/serde,
RetentionStats Debug/Clone/serde, RetentionAuditType serde all 6, RetentionAuditEvent
Debug/Clone/serde, RetentionError Display InvalidTransition+NotFound/std_error,
RetentionManager get_segment_mut/total_events/config accessor/segments_needing_roll.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
